passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass admits one person free of charge. Patrons may request one pass per week. Children under the age of three are admitted free.
Seasonal schedule - 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM, from Valentine’s Day through Columbus Day. You do not need to purchase tickets ahead of time or make a reservation unless you have 15 or more people. Ticket sales end at 3:30 PM, and no new customers will be admitted into the exhibits after 3:30 PM. The Butterfly Place suggests visitors arrive no later than 3:00 PM.
Patrons must bring physical (paper) coupon to the Butterfly Place to receive the discount.
For Museum questions, visit the Butterfly Place website https://butterflyplace-ma.com/  or call 978-392-0955
source_phrases: Each pass admits one person free of charge. Patrons may request one pass per week. Children under the age of three are admitted free.

passes.title: The Butterfly Place
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass admits up to 4 people at $5 off.
For Museum questions, visit their website at www.concordmuseum.org or call 978-369-9763
source_phrases: Each pass admits up to 4 people at $5 off.
For Museum questions, visit their website at www.concordmuseum.org or call 978-369-9763

passes.title: Concord Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This pass admits up to six guests to Davis Farmland or Davis Mega Maze with a savings of $10 off the at-the-gate admission rate.   Note: Adults must be accompanied by a least one child 12 years or younger when visiting Davis Farmland.
Davis Farmland and Davis Mega Maze are open weather permitting.  ALWAYS call or check the web before heading out. Check DavisFarmland.com or DavisMegaMaze.com for up-to-date schedules and weather-related closings.
Library passes are not valid on holidays, with packages, special events or other discounts.

passes.title: Davis Farmland
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass admits up to 3 people at 1/2 price per person to the museum and Discovery Woods.  Advance reservations are no longer accepted for admission.
 For details and questions, visit their website or call 978-264-4200.
source_phrases: Each pass admits up to 3 people at 1/2 price per person to the museum and Discovery Woods.  Advance reservations are no longer accepted for admission.
For details and questions, visit their website or call 978-264-4200.

passes.title: The Discovery Museums
passes.benefit_text: Each coupon provides a 50% discount on admission for up to 2 adults and 2 children who arrive in one vehicle. Children under two years of age are admitted free.  The EcoTarium is closed on some holidays. Please check the EcoTarium website for details. Museum pass coupons do not cover the cost for tickets to the Alden Digital Planetarium, the Explorer Express Train, or special ticketed events.

passes.title: Ecotarium
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass admits up to 4 people at 50% off the regular admission. One member of the party must be a Massachusetts resident. May not be combined with other discounts.
For Museum questions visit the HMSC website at hmsc.harvard.edu/visit or call 617-495-3045.

For Museum questions visit the HMSC website at hmsc.harvard.edu/visit or call 617-495-3045.

passes.title: Harvard Museums Of Science And Culture
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass admits up to 2 people at the discounted library price per person. Library passes are not valid for performances, events, or films.
Advanced tickets are highly recommended since the museum cannot guarantee day-of reservations. Visit the museum website  at https://www.icaboston.org/ or call 617-478-3100

passes.title: Institute Of Contemporary Art Boston
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass admits up to 4 people at $5 per person. Children under the age of 18 are admitted free.
Visitors must reserve timed-entry tickets online at gardermuseum.org/visit or through the Box Office (617-278-5156) at least 48 hours before visiting.
For Museum questions, visit their website or call 617-566-1401

passes.title: John F Kennedy Library And Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Pass reserved at Gleason Public Library, Carlisle MA.
Includes access to more than 60 wildlife sanctuaries across the state.
Each pass admits up to four (4) people at $2 per person (children under 2 free)
Please note that some sanctuaries may require reservations before visiting.  Always check the Mass Audubon website before planning a visit: https://massaudubon.org/get-outdoors/our-wildlife-sanctuaries/trails.         For questions, visit the Mass Audubon website or call 781-259-9500.
Passes made available by Friends of Gleason Public Library.
source_phrases: Pass reserved at Gleason Public Library, Carlisle MA.

passes.title: Mass Audubon
passes.benefit_text:
Pass entitles bearer to free parking for one passenger vehicle.
The Annual Parking Pass is not valid for parking at Quabbin Reservoir Boat Launch Areas, the North Point hourly rate lot in Cambridge, or any on-street Department of Conservation and Recreation location that charges an hourly rate.   For questions, visit their website at    https://www.mass.gov/guides/parking-at-massachusetts-state-parks or call 617-626-1420.
source_phrases: Pass entitles bearer to free parking for one passenger vehicle.

The Annual Parking Pass is not valid for parking at Quabbin Reservoir Boat Launch Areas, the North Point hourly rate lot in Cambridge, or any on-street Department of Conservation and Recreation location that charges an hourly rate.   For questions, visit their website at    https://www.mass.gov/guides/parking-at-massachusetts-state-parks or call 617-626-1420.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
source_phrases: Each pass admits two adults at $10 each for general admission and special exhibition and up to 4 children aged 7-17 at $10 each for special exhibition only.  There is no discount for children 7-17 for general admission (currently $10) . Children 6 and under are admitted free.

The Museum of Fine Arts suggests reserving tickets prior to your visit. Once you reserve the museum pass through this website, you will receive a confirmation email with a promo-code.  Use this code to reserve tickets on the MFA website or present it at the MFA admissions desk to receive your discount when you visit the museum.
For museum questions call the MFA customer service line at 1-800-440-6975.

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
source_phrases: This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.
Your Library pass can only be used on the date printed on the pass.
Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit.

When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass and purchase your Exhibit Hall tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or would like to reserve your Exhibit Hall passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9 a.m. - 5 p.m. daily).
If you are unable to show your library confirmation on a phone, you may print out a copy using the link in the confirmation email or request a paper copy from the library.
Library: Gleason Public Library

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text:
Library ID:  45737
This coupon allows 50% off admission to the New England Aquarium and applies to adult and child pricing.  Children under the age of 3 are admitted free.
This coupon is not a ticket. Visitors should redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium's ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details and for updated hours of operation.
Review the Aquarium’s website at www.neaq.org/safety ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience.
This coupon is valid for Aquarium admission only. It does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo sales.
source_phrases: Library ID:  45737
This coupon allows 50% off admission to the New England Aquarium and applies to adult and child pricing.  Children under the age of 3 are admitted free.
This coupon is not a ticket. Visitors should redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium's ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details and for updated hours of operation.
Review the Aquarium’s website at www.neaq.org/safety ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience.
This coupon is valid for Aquarium admission only. It does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo sales.
The coupon may not be sold, has no cash value, and is void if altered or copied.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass admits 2 guests at half price.
Online reservations are no longer required for admission to New England Botanic Garden at Tower Hill, but are available for those who would like to purchase tickets in advance.    Visitors to NEBG Tower Hill will need to bring the physical library pass with them to receive the discounted admission fee.
If you would like to reserve tickets online, first reserve the NEBG Tower Hill pass through this website.  You will receive a confirmation email which includes a promo-code. Visit the NEBG Tower Hill website at www.nebg.org and use the library promo-code at check out. You must also bring the library pass with you to enter NEBG Tower Hill at the discounted admission fee.
For Museum questions, call: 508-869-6111, or visit the website at www.nebg.org
source_phrases: Each pass admits 2 guests at half price.

For Museum questions, call: 508-869-6111, or visit the website at www.nebg.org

passes.title: New England Botanic Garden At Tower Hill
passes.benefit_text:
Half priced admission for up to 2 adults and 4 youths. Patrons should use the Timed-Entry Admission site on the Orchard House website to secure a pre-paid reservation at the 50% discount.  Please note: The discount is not applicable to special events, educational programs, large group tours, or merchandise purchases in the Museum Store. 
For Museum questions, see their website or call 978-369-4118

For Museum questions, see their website or call 978-369-4118

passes.title: Orchard House
passes.benefit_text: Each pass admits a maximum of two adult visitors at a reduced admission fee of $12 per person any day the museum is open. Children under age 16 are admitted free. Admission to special ticketed exhibitions may require a separate fee.
source_phrases: Each pass admits a maximum of two adult visitors at a reduced admission fee of $12 per person any day the museum is open. Children under age 16 are admitted free. Admission to special ticketed exhibitions may require a separate fee.

passes.title: Peabody Essex Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass admits up to 6 people for a discounted price. Visitors must present the bright orange pass from the library to receive the discount.  Paper passes  or electronic passes are not accepted.
Library passes are not accepted at Salem Witch Museum in the month of October.
For Museum questions, call: 978-744-1692 or visit their website www.salemwitchmuseum.com

passes.title: Salem Witch Museum
passes.benefit_text:
GO Pass coupon admits 2 adults and children under 18 to Trustees properties. 
Some Trustees locations require that visitors go online to reserve a timed-entry. Visit the Trustees website for up-to-date information: www.thetrustees.org/
GO Passes are valid for admission only. They are not valid for discounts at parking kiosks, stores, cafes, Inns, campgrounds, at special events or programs, on equipment rentals, or in place of any permits or passes. GO Pass admission is equivalent to a Trustees Family membership admission price at Trustees properties that charge an admission fee.
Locations include: DeCordova, Fruitlands Museum; Crane Estate; the Old Manse; and many more. Admission rates vary.
***Patrons need to check the operating hours for each specific property when reserving the pass. The GO Pass covers many properties with different operating hours throughout the year***
Please note only 1 GO Pass may be reserved per person.
source_phrases: GO Pass coupon admits 2 adults and children under 18 to Trustees properties.

passes.title: Trustees Of The Reservations
passes.benefit_text:
Admission to the USS Constitution Museum is on a first-come, first served basis. USS Constitution ship has limited hours.  Please check website for open days.
Each pass admits up to 5 people for free.
For Museum questions, visit their website (ussconstitutionmuseum.org/visit) or call 617-426-1812

passes.title: The Uss Constitution Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass admits up to 6 people with a $9.00 admission fee per adult and a $6.00 admission fee per child. Children under the age of two are admitted free.
This pass can be used for daytime admission to Stone Zoo or Franklin Park Zoo.
Please check the Zoo's website for hours and other questions, or call: 617-541-LION (5466).
